heading: Omitted
label: 755 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which related to execution of patents, deeds, and other instruments by the Secretary of the Interior, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1207, § 1568 Stat. 1103
